name: THE BROKEN WORLD.
description:
In this Realm, everyone is blessed with a certain energy known as AETHER, which helps the user manipulate certain things... Aether can be expressed as Arts.. There are 2 types of Arts..


PURE ARTS: Fire, Water, Earth, Air, Light, Dark, Ice, Lightning.
FORBIDDEN ARTS: Blood, Love, Venom, Celestial, Illusion, and Ghast.
Aether can also be reversed to form a regenerative and defensive energy known as AELIXIR.

The students would be divided into 3 wings based on their current rankings
1. SOLSTICE WING(Balance)
2. ABYSSAL WING(Rough)
3. ZENITH WING(Elite & Council Members)


But, soon.. a malevolent force was born.. with one unique affinity.. SOUL, he was Xratos.. THE FALLEN CROWN, he went about devouring empires, claiming territories and devouring lives, the world began teaching young Aetherians how to control their Aether and defeat the Fallen Crown and free this Broken World...

But, one day... The Fallen Crown disappeared... but never gone

They hence made a ranking scale to measure Aether Arts Mastery and Control Power scales:

F-RANK: Newbie.

E-RANK: Amateur.

D-RANK: Novice.

C-RANK: Advanced.

B-RANK: Excellent.

A-RANK: Master

S-RANK: Grandmaster.

X-RANK: World-ranked.

Now, the user will be sent to Nashville High, a renowned Aether school.. explore and grind your way up to the top.. and defeat the Fallen Crown and rebuild the Broken World.!
creator: Michael_Kaiser_exe
